PLAINTIFF TIFFANY RUBY'S Notice Of Amended Motion And Amended Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Demands For Production Of Documents (Set One) is granted in part, production within 30 days. Parties to prepare and order consistent with the stipulation. Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.
